scripts.dev:local: concurrently -n be,fe -c blue,green "cross-env BACKEND_PORT=3001 ADMIN_PIN=191181 LOCAL_BACKEND_AUTH_TOKEN=local-dev-token npm run dev:backend" "cross-env FRONTEND_PORT=5173 VITE_API_BASE_URL=http://localhost:3001 npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:remote: concurrently -n rbe,rfe -c magenta,cyan "cross-env REMOTE_BACKEND_PORT=3002 REMOTE_ADMIN_PIN=191181 REMOTE_JWT_SECRET=remote-dev-secret LOCAL_BACKEND_BASE_URL=http://localhost:3001 LOCAL_BACKEND_AUTH_TOKEN=local-dev-token npm run dev:remote-backend" "cross-env REMOTE_FRONTEND_PORT=5174 VITE_REMOTE_API_BASE_URL=http://localhost:3002 npm run dev:remote-frontend"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n be,fe,rbe,rfe -c blue,green,magenta,cyan "npm run dev:local" "npm run dev:remote"
